description: Security knowledge base for Fix My Vibe scanner — threat patterns, OWASP, stack-specific guidance

embedding_config.note: Uses Azure OpenAI embeddings service; set AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT and AZURE_OPENAI_KEY

chunking_strategy.note: Chunks break on threat/pattern boundaries, preserving semantic context

schema.id: document identifier (MD5 hash of source + chunk index)
schema.source_url: URL of source document (retrievable for citations)
schema.threat_categories: Array of threat types: injection, crypto, logging, config, secrets, etc.
schema.owasp_mappings: OWASP Top 10 codes: A01, A02, A03, A05, A07, A09
schema.stack_applicable_to: Array of stacks: python, fastapi, javascript, react, nodejs, django, express, flask
schema.source_publication_date: ISO format date for freshness tracking (YYYY-MM)

search_config.note: Supports vector search + semantic ranking; enable hybrid search for both semantic + keyword

metadata_filters.threat_category: Filter results by threat (injection, crypto, logging, etc.)
metadata_filters.stack_applicable_to: Filter by stack (python, fastapi, javascript, react, nodejs, etc.)
metadata_filters.owasp_mappings: Filter by OWASP category (A02, A07, etc.)
metadata_filters.note: Researcher agent can use filters to narrow results by detected stack

integration_with_researcher_agent.query_pattern: Search for [threat] on [stack]: Researcher passes stack context to filter results
integration_with_researcher_agent.citation_source: source_url field is used for grounding/citations
integration_with_researcher_agent.fallback: If no results, Researcher falls back to Tavily web search
integration_with_researcher_agent.example_query: SELECT * FROM fix-my-vibe-security-kb WHERE threat_categories contains 'injection' AND stack_applicable_to contains 'fastapi'

refresh_checklist: Check OWASP Top 10 for updates (released annually, Jan)
Check CWE Top 25 for updates (released annually, Jan)
Check NIST SSDF for new guidance
Verify all source URLs still live (no paywalls, redirects)
Add new framework guidance as Fix My Vibe scanner expands
maintenance.re_indexing: Run ingest_security_kb.py again with updated sources.json to re-create index
